title: Speculating Experts Accelerates Inference for Mixture-of-Experts
summary: arXiv:2603.19289v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models have gained popularity as a means of scaling the capacity of large language models (LLMs) while maintaining sparse activations and reduced per-token compute.
